title: 14.10.2024  İngilizce Yeterlik Sınavı (DÜİYES) Önemli Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Sevgili Öğrencilerimiz,

Tıklayınız

October 14rd ,2024, English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program 2024-2025 Academic Year Spring Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

The 2024-2025 English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered for international and transfer students on Monday, October 14rd, and invigilated face-to-face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions, and students must attend both sessions.

The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 11.30 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You have to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

· DÜİYES results will be announced on October 18th.

You can learn the exam venue information from office number 135 on the exam day.
